titleStmt.title: SII 33.46: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 46. (A.R. No. 152 of 1946.) Eṟṟabaḷḷa, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Rock inside the Pañchaliṅga cave facing the east.
This is dated [Śaka 1363], Durmati, Pushya śu. 15, Thursday. corresponding to 1441 A.D., December 28, Thursday, śu. 15 had ended at °97 the previous day.

Damaged. Records a gift of lands at Eṟambaḍi and Pulivindla for the daily offerings and conducting 16 kinds of rituals of homages (Shoḍaśōpachāra) to the god Pañchaliṅgalasiddhayya on the Amṛitagiri by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmayya, son of Vallabhayya. The gift was made into the hands of Nāgadēva, son of Jaṅgama Saṁgamadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁdu¨rmmati saṁvatsara puṣya suddha 15 gu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara Atyaṁbara(gaṁ*)ḍḍamaṁnya gajapati saṁbha(va) vallabhayyadēva mahārājulā
kumāruṁḍu tiṁmmayyadēva mahārājulu jaṁgaṁ saṁgamadēvani koḍuku nāgadēva niniki yiccina dhaṁ¨rmaśāsanaṁ . mānāyaṁkrānaku jelle
puliviṁdala staḷaṁ yaṟaṁbaḍiyalasīmaṁgala dēvasthānaṁ Amrutagiri paṁcaliṁggāla siddhayya dēvuniki nīvu pūja cesē Aṭṭugānuṁnnu sāgiṁcci nelipitimi
A dēvunikiṣōḍa śōpacārā(nku) . nayivedyamuṁnnu sāgēṭaṭṭugānu mā nāyaṁkrānakuṁjelle yeṟaṁbaḍiyela polamulonu bolli(kala)kanu ma
tū¨rpuEttu maralukunu mamōyeḍiki dakṣaṇōttara muddala vocijēcenuga 1 ku guttagaḍḍukoni cese jilavaḍi vāyōnu 17 yeṁddu boya teruvu
tūmu cenuṁnnu . puliviṁdalamulōnu yaṟaguḍi vāru cēsē Avuḍūri kāluvanu prākuni gaṭṭu nive nīru gaṭṭu maḍi
kolavaḍi pāḍi maḍini muttu muṁnnu peṭṭitimigāna Amaḍiṁni cenuṁnnu tissaya devanāyamu cesukoni . sīsayaṭi
cesuvāṁḍamuṁnūṭinuṁnnu maḍiṁnni Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyinā sūyye
Aṣṭabhōgatējasāṁmyataluṁnnu celleAṭṭu sa¨rvvamāṁnyamugānu mā taṁḍri
mahārājulaku puṁṇyamugānu dāravōsi dhārāpū¨rvvaka� yi
stimigānu mī dhaṁ¨rmmānaku yevvaru dappinānu gaṁgaka Atanu kapilagōvuna
jaṁppina pāpānaṁ bōṁgalavāru śrī Avubhaḷa
nighā jatapu ḍḍānu
daṁḍrulu galaṁta gāṁyennu
vallabhayyadēva
Digital edition of SII 33.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
